body_txt: This trope is for when, in the middle of some tense, possibly life-or-death situation, one character will remark to the other: "You know, this reminds me of a similar story..." The other character, hopeful , will remark "Oh, and they succeeded?" and of course, the first character says "No, they all died , actually." May overlap with Metaphorgotten if the person giving the example genuinely forgot the unfortunate ending of it. Also overlaps with Analogy Backfire , "Shaggy Dog" Story and Ice-Cream Koan .
